jsCode: (function(){function scrape(){try{const data={};document.querySelectorAll('#gvData .Trending_top3_label').forEach(function(label){const text=label.innerText.trim().toUpperCase();const value=label.closest('table').querySelector('.GDINRRates span')?.innerText.trim();if(!value)return;if(text.includes('GOLD($)'))data.gold=value;else if(text==='INR')data.inr=value;else if(text.includes('GOLD COSTING'))data.goldMcx=value;});document.querySelectorAll('#gvData_Silver .Trending_top3_label').forEach(function(label){const text=label.innerText.trim().toUpperCase();const value=label.closest('table').querySelector('.GDINRRates span')?.innerText.trim();if(!value)return;if(text==='SILVER')data.silver=value;});document.querySelectorAll('.Script_Nameee').forEach(function(el){const text=el.innerText.trim().toUpperCase();if(text.includes('SILVER COSTING (PREM) RATE CUT')){const row=el.closest('tr');const spans=row.querySelectorAll('span');if(spans.length){const rate=spans[spans.length-1].innerText.trim();data.silverMcx=rate;}}});console.log('SCRAPED DATA',data);window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify(data));}catch(e){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({error:e.message}));}}setTimeout(scrape,3000);setInterval(scrape,3000);})();true;
